---
title: "Getting Started with Python"
author: 
  - name: Kat Le
    url: https://github.com/katleyq
    affiliation: Bren School of Envrionmental Science & Management
    affiliation-url: https://bren.ucsb.edu/
  - name: Sam Shanny-Csik
    url: https://samanthacsik.github.io/
    # affiliation: Bren School of Envrionmental Science & Management
    # affiliation-url: https://bren.ucsb.edu/
date: May 27, 2026
format: 
  html:
    theme: meds-website-styles.scss
    mainfont: "Nunito"
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
include-in-header:
  - text: |
     <link rel = "shortcut icon" href = "images/python-logo.png" />
---

<br>

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "25%"
#| fig-align: "center"
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("images", "python-logo.png"))
```

::: {.center-text .body-text-l}
***THIS DOCUMENT IS CURRENTLY UNDER CONSTRUCTION***
:::

{{< include /sections/0-setup.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/1-slides.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/2-code.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/3-contribute.qmd >}}
